title: The Prodigal Judge
writer: Edward José, Vaughn Kester, John Lynch
actors: Jean Paige, Macklyn Arbuckle, Ernest Torrence
plot: Returning to his estate in North Carolina, Judge Slocum Price, a member of Congress in 1830, finds that his wife has taken their child and eloped with David Gatewood; and the domestic tragedy causes him to become a vagabond. Five ...
